description: Host Metal profiling matrix (macOS / Apple Silicon). Excludes the QJL kvCache leg until the MSL kernel lands (porting plan task #21). DFlash works on Metal once the shim is wired (task #22) — kept in the matrix so reports document the gap.

prompts.text: What is the capital of France?
Explain in three sentences why the sky is blue.
Write a 200-word story about a small robot who wants to learn to paint.
